commit.subject: LU-6142 mdt: Fix style issues for mdt_lib.c
commit.message:
LU-6142 mdt: Fix style issues for mdt_lib.c

This patch fixes issues reported by checkpatch
for file lustre/mdt/mdt_lib.c
